messages.content: act as a consultant What was the total value of the mobile gaming industry in 2020? Choose the closest answer

As an AI language model, I cannot know the precise number for 2020 as it can change within seconds, but according to a report by Newzoo, the global mobile gaming market was worth $68.5 billion in 2019.
In which of the following situations would you prefer NOT to use news articles (as a first choice of research methods) to back up your assumptions? (Choose all answers that apply)

As an AI language model, I cannot make assumptions or judgments. However, here are some situations where news articles might not be the best choice of research method:

- When seeking in-depth analysis or academic research on a particular topic.
- When the news article is based on a single source or lacks credible sources.
- When the news article is biased or opinionated, or lacks objectivity.
- When the news article is outdated and doesn't reflect recent developments or changes in the subject matter.
act as a consultant What was Diageo’s ROI (Return on Investment) in the year 2021, select the closest answer?

As an AI language model, I do not have real-time access to current financial information about companies. However, according to Diageo's website and annual reports, as of their FY2020, the company's basic earnings per share increased by 2.6%, and their return on invested capital (ROIC) was 9.4%. They have not yet reported their financial results for FY2021.
What were Ghana’s FDI (Foreign Direct Investment) inflows in 2005? (Please select the closest answer and any that apply)

As an AI language model, I do not have access to real-time or historical data unless it's provided. However, according to the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD), Ghana received a total FDI inflow of $1.5 billion in 2005.
Europe(EU) is the largest investor in Africa as of December 2021. True or false?

As an AI language model, I cannot provide information about the present or future as it's constantly changing. However, based on the latest available data from the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD) for 2020, the European Union (EU) was not the largest investor in Africa. In fact, South Africa was the largest recipient of FDI in Africa in 2020, followed by Egypt, Morocco, and Ghana respectively. The EU is still one of the largest foreign investors in Africa as a group of countries.
The shortcut to send a worksheet to MS PowerPoint is ___
In Microsoft Excel, the shortcut to send a worksheet to MS PowerPoint is "Alt + F10". This will create a new PowerPoint presentation with the selected worksheet data.
Using Thinkcell what type of chart would you use if you need to show the market share of different companies in a sector over a period of 5 years?

If you need to show the market share of different companies in a sector over a period of 5 years, you can use a stacked column chart in Thinkcell. A stacked column chart can display the market share of each company as a proportion of the entire sector over the 5-year period. This chart type helps to visualize the company's market position and compare it to its competitors in the sector.
What is the largest company by revenue in the gaming industry after the recent deals?

As an AI language model, I do not have access to the most up-to-date information on the gaming industry. However, as of 2021, some of the largest companies in the gaming industry by revenue were Tencent, Sony Corporation, Microsoft Corporation, Activision Blizzard, and Electronic Arts. It is worth noting that this list can change frequently due to mergers, acquisitions, and other corporate deals.

Assume you have been given information on the sales numbers of the gaming industry broken down by type in 2020, including revenues from the top 5 games released in 2020. What 4 data points would you want to look at? Sort in order of importance

As a consultant, the four data points I would want to look at, sorted in order of importance, are:

1. Total revenue of the gaming industry in 2020 - this is the most important data point, as it provides an overall picture of the industry's performance for the year.
2. Breakdown of sales numbers by type - understanding the sales distribution by different categories such as mobile games, console games, PC games could help to identify trends and opportunities in the market.
3. Revenue generated by the top 5 games released in 2020 - this data point can shed light on the impact of blockbuster games on the industry's revenue for the year.
4. Comparison of revenue growth/decline from the previous year - reviewing year-over-year changes in revenue can help to identify growth areas or declines in the industry and enable better decision-making in the future.
What was the total value of the mobile gaming industry in 2020?
As an AI language model, I am not always up-to-date with the latest numbers, but according to a report by Newzoo, the global mobile gaming industry was valued at $77.2 billion in 2020.

In which of the following situations would you prefer NOT to use news articles (as a first choice of research methods) to back up your assumptions? (Choose all answers that apply)


You are looking to record the financial details of a recent deal in the hospitality industry 

You are required to find the value of the sovereign debt of a country in order to create an investment plan

You need to report on the historical revenues of a publicly listed firm in the automotive industry 

You need to note the number of airline customers passing through Berlin Tegel airport

Using news articles as a first choice of research method would be least preferable in the following two situations:

- When you are required to find the value of the sovereign debt of a country in order to create an investment plan as news articles might not provide up-to-date or accurate information on a country's sovereign debt details.
- When you need to report on the historical revenues of a publicly listed firm in the automotive industry as news articles might not provide a complete picture of the company's financial details.

In the other two situations:

- You can use news articles to report on the details of a recent deal in the hospitality industry.
- You can also use news articles to note the number of airline customers passing through Berlin Tegel airport.

What were Ghana’s FDI (Foreign Direct Investment) inflows in 2005? (Please select the closest answer and any that apply)

USD 145 Million
USD 44 Million
USD 4B 
USD 0.14 B

According to the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development (UNCTAD), Ghana received a total FDI inflow of USD 1.5 billion in 2005. Therefore, the closest answer is "USD 1.4 Billion". None of the other options are accurate.
The shortcut to send a worksheet to MS PowerPoint is ___
In Microsoft Excel, the shortcut to send a worksheet to MS PowerPoint is "Alt + F10". This will create a new PowerPoint presentation with the selected worksheet data.

Assume you have been given information on the sales numbers of the gaming industry broken down by type in 2020, including revenues from the top 5 games released in 2020. What 4 data points would you want to look at? Sort in order of importance


Average revenues earned by different types of games in the industry 

Sum of the total revenues in the industry broken down by type 

Average cost of product for different types of games 

Share of the top 5 games as a percentage of total revenues

As a consultant, the four data points I would want to look at, sorted in order of importance, are:

1. Sum of the total revenues in the industry broken down by type - this is the most important data point, as it provides an overall picture of the sales distribution across different categories in the industry.
2. Share of the top 5 games as a percentage of total revenues - this data point can shed light on how much of the industry's revenue is generated by blockbuster games.
3. Average revenues earned by different types of games in the industry - understanding the revenue distribution by different categories such as mobile games, console games, and PC games could help to identify trends and opportunities in the market.
4. Average cost of the product for different types of games - this data point can help to identify patterns or trends in pricing across different game types, which can inform pricing strategies for new products.

You have been asked to create a slide on the potential of future M&A (Mergers and Acquisitions) in the gaming industry. which of the following is the most important and relevant element of the slide based on your research?

A chart showing growing revenues In the industry especially In the mobile gaming space which is driving M&A

The title of the slide pointing out that M&A will continue as owning marketable properties is the most Important factor to companies in the sector 

The takeaway section posting out that future deals will continue as because companies want to outdo each other 

A chart showing the total market share of different types of games

Given that the slide is about the potential for future M&A in the gaming industry, the most important and relevant element for the slide would be:

- The title of the slide pointing out that M&A will continue as owning marketable properties is the most important factor to companies in the sector.

This title provides a clear and concise summary of the slide's content, highlighting the main reason why M&A will continue in the industry. It also indicates that acquiring marketable properties is a crucial factor for companies in the sector, which is useful information for the audience to know.

While the other options could be relevant, they don't directly answer the question of why there is potential for future M&A in the gaming industry. A chart showing growing revenues in the industry, or the total market share of different game types, could be supporting visuals to add more context to the presentation, but the title remains the most important takeaway from this slide.
